name_en: (Original Order Quality) Exclusive authentic development, 100% top-grain cowhide, authentic old print fabric. Actual product photos. Clean and neat craftsmanship reflects care in every step. Crossbody strap with logo looks premium, adjustable length. Suitable for work or daily commute, can be formal or casual. Holds daily essentials well. Great capacity, ready for going out. Free your pockets and hands.
